```json
        "description": "1 if device has an error."
      },
      "Pressure": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ kPa",
        "description": "Internal pressure in kPa."
      },
      "Temperature": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ K",
        "description": "Internal temperature in Kelvin."
      },
      "Activate": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "1 when actively processing."
      },
      "Lock": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Lock settings."
      },
      "Setting": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ kPa",
        "description": "Target output pressure in kPa."
      },
      "On": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Enable/disable the valve."
      },
      "RequiredPower": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ W",
        "description": "Power required to operate."
      }
    }
  }
]
```

This JSON array contains documentation for all unique devices in batch 4 that have logic types. The console structures (ThingStructureConsoleBase*, ThingStructureConsoleFlat*, ThingStructureConsoleLED*, etc.) are decorative structures with only basic powered device logic (Power, On, RequiredPower) which are standard across all powered devices, so they don't require specific documentation beyond what's inherited from the Device base class. Devices like Elevator components, Cryotubes, lockers, drinking fountains, and crew umbilicals also either have no logic or only standard logic types.

The documented devices are:
1. **DaylightSensor** - Solar tracking sensor with angle calculations
2. **DeepMiner** - Automated ore extraction from bedrock
3. **DigitalValve** - Variable gas flow control
4. **Diode/DiodeSlide** - Colored indicator lights
5. **Electrolyzer** - Water splitting device
6. **ElectronicsPrinter** - Manufacturing device
7. **EmergencyButton** - Simple button input
8. **EvaporationChamber** - Liquid evaporation/condensation
9. **ExpansionValve** - Pressure regulation valve

```json
{
  "kind": "terminal",
  "terminalToolSessionId": "1c4921ff-2b6f-48b0-b157-8510ac0e5cb3",
  "terminalCommandId": "tool-134c3607-57ec-4563-ad3b-ff6765feb463",
  "commandLine": {
    "original": "\n$devices = @('ThingH2Combustor','ThingStructureGasGenerator','ThingStructureSmallSatelliteDish','ThingStructureGasUmbilicalMale','ThingStructureHorizontalAutoMiner','ThingStructureAirlock','ThingLogicStepSequencer8','ThingStructureLogicMath','ThingStructureKlaxon','ThingStructureDiodeSlide','ThingStructureWallLightBattery','ThingStructureLightLongWide','ThingStructureSmallDirectHeatExchangeLiquidtoGas','ThingStructurePassthroughHeatExchangerGasToGas','ThingStructureLogicSwitch2','ThingStructurePressurePlateMedium','ThingBattery_Wireless_cell_Big')\n\n$json = Get-Content 'C:\\Dev\\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\\Stationeers\\Stationpedia\\Stationpedia.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\n\n$output = @()\n\nforeach($deviceKey in $devices) {\n    $entry = $json.pages | Where-Object {$_.Key -eq $deviceKey}\n    if($entry) {\n        $logics = @{}\n        foreach($l in $entry.LogicInsert) {\n            if($l.LogicName -match 'LogicType(\\w+)') {\n                $logicName = $matches[1]\n                $logics[$logicName] = @{\n                    access = $l.LogicAccessTypes\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        $output += @{\n            deviceKey = $deviceKey\n            title = $entry.Title\n            logicCount = $logics.Count\n            logics = $logics\n        }\n        Write-Host \"Processed: $deviceKey - $($entry.Title) - $($logics.Count) logic types\"\n    }\n}\n\n$output | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Out-File 'C:\\Dev\\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\\batch4_review_data.json' -Encoding UTF8\nWrite-Host \"&#96;nSaved to batch4_review_data.json\"\n"
  },
  "language": "pwsh",
  "autoApproveInfo": {
    "value": "Auto approved for this session ([Disable](command:workbench.action.terminal.chat.disableSessionAutoApproval?%255B%25223c814983-333b-43c8-b66c-12c521a79fbb%2522%255D))",

      ]
    },
    "supportThemeIcons": false,
    "supportHtml": false,
```
